design_philosophy.core_concept: Digital Caddie meets Private Club. Clean, legible outdoor-friendly UI with prestigious aesthetics.
design_philosophy.visual_style: Minimalist Sport. High contrast for outdoor visibility. Textured backgrounds (grain) to mimic paper scorecards.

typography.instructions: Import 'Barlow Condensed' (Weights: 400, 600, 700, 800) and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts in index.html.

primary.description: Deep Clubhouse Green. Used for primary buttons, active states, and heavy branding.

secondary.description: Bone/Sand. Used for section backgrounds to reduce outdoor glare compared to pure white.

accent.description: Trophy Gold. Used for leaderboards, winners, and high-value actions.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-none uppercase font-bold tracking-widest px-8 py-3 shadow-lg
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground border border-primary/20 hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-none uppercase font-bold tracking-widest px-8 py-3

cards.style: bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm border border-border/40 rounded-sm relative overflow-hidden

inputs.style: rounded-none border-x-0 border-t-0 border-b-2 border-input bg-transparent px-0 py-2 focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-primary placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50 transition-colors

scorecard.cell: w-12 h-16 flex flex-col items-center justify-center border-r border-border/20 last:border-r-0

dashboard.header: col-span-full mb-8 flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start md:items-center gap-4 border-b border-border/40 pb-6

mobile_score_entry.hole_navigator: flex overflow-x-auto snap-x py-4 gap-2 px-4 no-scrollbar
mobile_score_entry.input_area: flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-8 p-6

images.description: Panoramic green golf course for landing page hero.
Subtle paper texture for scorecard backgrounds (optional).

universal_guidelines: Always use 'Manrope' for UI text and 'Barlow Condensed' for headings.
Do NOT use pure black (#000000). Use #0A0A0A or #121212.
Ensure high contrast for outdoor usage. Text on white backgrounds should be dark grey/green.
Interactive elements must have a min-height of 44px for mobile accessibility.
All interactive elements must have 'data-testid' attributes.
